mapper.insert: insert into app_user_storage (user_id, product_id, name, brand, image_url, quantity, unit_price, line_total, currency, energy_kcal, fat, saturated_fat, carbohydrates, sugars, fiber, proteins, salt, created_at, consumption, updated_at) values (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{name}, #{brand}, #{imageUrl}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{lineTotal}, #{currency}, #{energyKcal}, #{fat}, #{saturatedFat}, #{carbohydrates}, #{sugars}, #{fiber}, #{proteins}, #{salt}, #{createdAt}, #{consumption}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) on duplicate key update quantity = quantity + values(quantity), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update:
update app_user_storage
quantity = #{quantity},
updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
where storage_id = #{storageId} and user_id = #{userId}

update app_user_storage
consumption = #{consumption},
updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
where storage_id = #{storageId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: delete from app_user_storage where storage_id = #{storageId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select storage_id,user_id, product_id, name, brand, image_url, quantity, unit_price, line_total, currency, energy_kcal, fat, saturated_fat, carbohydrates, sugars, fiber, proteins, salt, created_at, consumption, updated_at from app_user_storage where storage_id=#{storageId}

select storage_id, user_id, product_id, name, brand, image_url, quantity, unit_price, line_total, currency, energy_kcal, fat, saturated_fat, carbohydrates, sugars, fiber, proteins, salt, created_at, consumption, updated_at from app_user_storage where user_id=#{userId}
